settings.title: Daobidao Settings
settings.subtitle: Voice input tool — hold hotkey to speak, release to type
settings.stt_variant_desc: Qwen3-ASR model size. Larger is more accurate but slower; first switch downloads the weights.
settings.streaming_mode_desc: See text appear while you speak. Release has no extra delay. Off: full paste on release.
settings.hotkey_desc: Hold this key to start recording
settings.sound_desc: Play sound when recording starts and stops
settings.overlay_desc: Show status overlay on screen during recording
settings.tray_status_desc: Tray icon color changes with recording/recognition status
settings.port_desc: Port number for browser to access settings page
settings.restart_notice: Changes to hotkey or port require app restart to take effect
settings.log_level_desc: Switch to DEBUG to troubleshoot; requires restart to take effect
settings.open_log_dir_desc: Open the log directory in a file manager
settings.confirm_restart: This setting requires an app restart to take effect. Restart now?
settings.confirm_reset: Are you sure you want to restore all settings to defaults?
settings.confirm_quit: Are you sure you want to quit Daobidao?
settings.mic_permission_hint: Click "Start check" to see live waveform
settings.mic_record_desc: Click to record, click again to stop and play back
settings.update_check_desc: Query PyPI on startup for new releases
update.done_later: New version installed. You can restart manually later.
update.hint: You'll be asked to restart after the update finishes
main.hotkey: Hotkey: {hotkey} (hold to speak, release to type)
main.streaming_overflow: Utterance too long, please speak in shorter segments
main.stale_instance_blocked: Port {port} is in use, but the occupant is not daobidao. Close the conflicting program, change settings_port in config.yaml, or pass --allow-multiple to skip the check.
main.ready: Ready! Hold the hotkey to start speaking
main.no_tray: pystray/Pillow not installed, skipping system tray
perm.waiting_for_grant: Waiting for grant... Please enable Daobidao in the system prompt or System Settings > Privacy & Security.
hotkey.accessibility_hint: Please go to System Settings > Privacy & Security > Accessibility
hotkey.grant_access: and grant access to the current terminal or application
hotkey.no_keyboard: Error: No keyboard device found. Please make sure:
hotkey.add_input_group: 2. Add user to input group: sudo usermod -aG input $USER
cli.init_help: Initialize: install .app bundle (macOS) + download STT model
cli.allow_multiple_help: Skip the single-instance check, allowing multiple daobidao processes to coexist (settings_port still conflicts; each instance needs its own port)
cli.uninstall_help: Clean up .app bundle, LaunchAgent, TCC permissions (then run uv tool uninstall daobidao)
init.download_model: Downloading STT model (~990 MB on first run for 0.6B)...
init.done: Initialization complete! Run daobidao to start.
uninstall.done:
Cleanup complete. You can now run:
  uv tool uninstall daobidao
